Component.Name: ItemGridCol
Component.Caption: sItem
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLPickListRefs( PROPERTIES(CoiItem, ItmDescription) DISPLAY(1,2)DISTINCT() FILTER(PickListId = FV(PicklistVar)))

Component.Name: LocationGridCol
Component.Caption: sLocation
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLItemLocs( PROPERTIES(Loc, LocDescription, QtyOnHand, Whse) FILTER(Item=FP(2.Item) AND Whse=FP(Whse)))

Component.Name: LotGridCol
Component.Caption: sLot
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLLotLocs( PROPERTIES(Lot, Loc, Item, Whse, QtyOnHand) DISPLAY(1,2,4,5)DISTINCT() FILTER(Item=FC(ItemGridCol) AND Loc=FC(LocationGridCol) AND Whse=FP(Whse)))

Component.Name: PickListSeqGridCol
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLPickListRefs( PROPERTIES(Sequence, RefNum, RefLineSuf, RefRelease, CoiItem, ItmDescription, ItmUM, Loc, LotTracked, SerTracked) DISPLAY(1,2,3,4,5)DISTINCT() FILTER(PickListId = FV(PicklistVar)))

Component.Name: SerialNumberGridCol
Component.Caption: sS/N
Component.ComboListSource: STDOLE SLSerials( PROPERTIES(SerNum, Loc, Lot) DISPLAY(1)FILTER(Item=FC(ItemGridCol) AND Loc=FC(LocationGridCol) AND Lot = FC(LotGridCol) AND (RsvdNum = '' OR (RsvdNumWhse = FP(Whse) AND RsvdNumLoc = FC(LocationGridCol) AND RsvdNumLot = FC(LotGridCol) AND RsvdNumRefNum = FC(OrderGridCol) AND RsvdNumRefLine = FC(LineGridCol) AND RsvdNumRefRelease = FC(ReleaseGridCol) AND DerExistRsvdNumForShipment = 0 AND DerIsSerialPicked = 0)) AND AssignedToBePicked = 0 AND Whse=FP(Whse)))

EventHandler.Name: ExecuteComplete
EventHandler.Response: SLLots.OldLotSerShipSp( PARMS(VAR V(PicklistVar), VAR P, VAR V(ProcessID), RVAR V(PromptMsg), RVAR V(PromptButtons), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: ExecuteComplete
EventHandler.Response: SLTmpPickListLocs.PickConfirmationCompleteSp( PARMS(VAR V(ProcessID), VAR V(PicklistVar), VAR V(RecordDiffVar), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PickConfirmationBuild
EventHandler.Response: SLTmpPickListLocs.PickConfirmationSp( PARMS(VAR V(ProcessID), VAR V(PicklistVar), VAR V(RecordDiffVar), MESSAGE) ERRORMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) SUCCESSMESSAGE(mBackEndMessage) )

EventHandler.Name: PickConfirmationBuild
EventHandler.Response: SCRIPTTEXT(Option Explicit On_x0D_ Option Strict On_x0D_ _x0D_ Imports System_x0D_ Imports Microsoft.VisualBasic_x0D_ Imports Mongoose.IDO.Protocol_x0D_ Imports Mongoose.Scripting_x0D_ _x0D_ Namespace SyteLine.GlobalScripts_x0D_ Public Class EvHandler_PickConfirmationBuild_2_x0D_ Inherits GlobalScript_x0D_ _x0D_ Sub Main()_x0D_ _x0D_ ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.Filter = "PickListId='" + ThisForm.Variables("PicklistVar").Value + "'"_x0D_ ThisForm.PrimaryIDOCollection.Refresh()_x0D_ ReturnValue = "0"_x0D_ End S

EventHandler.Name: StdObjectSelectCurrentCompleted
EventHandler.Response: SLFormExtMsgEntities.FormatJSONVar( PARMS(VAR PickConfirmation, VAR V(JSONVarNotInterpret), RVAR V(JSONVarWithLIT)) COLID(object) )

Variable.Name: cew_FeatureControllerEdit
Variable.Value: Visible:#C(ScsCustSerNumGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_68758ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefLocgridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefSeqgridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefTypegridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefWCgridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ReleaseToDestcheckBox), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ReleaseToDestGC), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True",

Variable.Name: cvw_FeatureControlEdit
Variable.Value: Visible:#C(ScsCustSerNumGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_68758ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(LotGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_71568ActiveVar) <> "1", "True", Visible:#C(CustLotGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_71568ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(LotGridForCustLotCol), #GV(IsCSIB_71568ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefLocgridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefSeqgridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(RefTypegridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Vis
Variable.Value2: ible:#C(RefWCgridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ReleaseToDestcheckBox), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ReleaseToDestGC), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(SelectedGridCol), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(TotecheckBox), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(TotecomboBox), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(ToteIdGC), #GV(IsCSIB_61605ActiveVar) = "1", "True", Visible:#C(Selec

Variable.Name: fds_SC2
Variable.Value: OBJECT2( SLTmpPickListLocs( CA(DIVNRS) OBJNAME(oPickConfirmation) FILTERPERM(ProcessID=FV(ProcessID)) ORDERBY(PickListSeq,Item,Lot,SerNum) ) )

ScriptLines.ScriptLine: If oCache(s)("SerNum").GetValueOfString("") = "" And oCache(s)("QtyPick").GetValue(Of Decimal)() > 0 Then
If oCache(s)("Lot").GetValueOfString("") = "" And oCache(s)("QtyPick").GetValue(Of Decimal)() > 0 Then
If oCache(s)("Loc").GetValue(Of String)() = "" And oCache(s)("QtyPick").GetValue(Of Decimal)() > 0 And oCache(s)("DerNonInventoryItemFlag").GetValue(Of Decimal)() = 0 Then
